data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of automatic link generation at booking confirmation. While the linked use case describes a scenario where a Zoom link is generated, there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality is consistently implemented across all necessary integrations, specifically Google Meet and Teams. The lack of evidence for these integrations indicates a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence for Google Meet and Teams integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
